name: aislewright
description: Open-source, self-hostable wedding website and RSVP platform.

scripts.build: corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/api build && corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/web build
scripts.typecheck: corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/shared typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/shared build && corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/api typecheck && corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/web typecheck
scripts.lint: corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/shared lint && corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/api lint && corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/web lint
scripts.test: corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/shared test && corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/api test && corepack pnpm --filter @aislewright/web test
